headline: Nvidia-Tied AI Stocks Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent To Join S&P 500 Index
summary: AI stocks Vertiv, Lumentum and Coherent, all with strong Nvidia ties, will join the S&P 500 before the open on March 23, along with EchoStar.

raw.headline: Nvidia-Tied AI Stocks Vertiv, Lumentum, Coherent To Join S&P 500 Index

headline: MU, LRCX, AMAT, GEV All Added to the S&P 100 As AI Stocks Gain Influence
summary: It’s the Super Bowl of index rebalancing tonight! The biggest news was the S&P 500 adding Vertiv (VRT), Lumentum (LITE), Coherent (COHR), and EchoStar (SATS). However, S&P Dow Jones Indices also rebalanced other indexes like the S&P 100 and S&P MidCap 400. Four stocks were added to the S&P 100 on the evening of March ... headline: Tesla Stock Slips. Its Losing Streak Continues.
summary: Tesla  stock fell Friday, failing to eke out a gain for the week.  An energy report from William Blair didn’t give the shares a needed boost.  The move came after a Thursday report from William Blair analyst Jed Dorsheimer, which reviewed data center construction.

headline: Tesla Stock Slips. It’s Still on Pace to Snap a Two-Week Losing Streak.
summary: Tesla  stock was down early on Friday as it tries to eke out a gain for the week.  An energy report from William Blair might give it a little boost.  Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were down 0.5% at $403.70 in premarket trading, while  and  futures were down 0.3% and 0.2%, respectively.
